heading: Commit Messages: Bad vs Good
rows: fix: prevent duplicate form submission on double-click
Future you needs to know what was fixed and why
feat: add email verification to signup flow
Describe the feature, not the action of coding
refactor: extract payment validation into shared utility
WIP commits should be squashed before merging
docs: add API authentication examples to README
Commit messages are permanent project documentation
fix: handle null user profile in dashboard header (#142)
Reference the issue number so the fix is traceable
test: add edge case coverage for cart total calculation
Every commit should be a complete, working change
